name: retritis
description: Retritis — palliative treatments for agent-assisted development. Claude Code plugins for the retritis tool suite.

plugins.name: blq
plugins.description: Build Log Query — stop copy-pasting terminal output into chat

plugins.name: jetsam
plugins.description: Git workflow accelerator — save, sync, ship without the five-step dance

plugins.name: fledgling
plugins.description: DuckDB code analysis — definitions, callers, structure, similarity

plugins.name: squackit
plugins.description: Code intelligence MCP server — smart defaults, session caching, compound workflows

plugins.name: kibitzer
plugins.description: Tool call observer — suggests structured alternatives when you reach for grep
